AppConfiguration.title: AppConfiguration
AppConfiguration.description: Stores global configuration settings and static content for the Sai Paduka Portal, manageable via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AppConfiguration entity. This is typically a singleton entity with one record.

eventName.description: The official name of the event or portal (e.g., 'Sai Paduka').

organizerName.description: The name of the organization hosting the event (e.g., 'Sai Parivar Ambala').

locationDescription.description: A descriptive text for the event's physical location (e.g., 'Aggarwal Bhavan').

eventDate.description: The primary date of the event.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the event.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the event.

instagramLink.description: Link to the event's or organization's Instagram profile.

facebookLink.description: Link to the event's or organization's Facebook page.

venueAddressGoogleMapEmbedLink.description: An embeddable URL for the venue's location on Google Maps, editable via the Admin Panel.

liveDarshanYoutubeLink.description: The URL for the live Darshan stream on YouTube, to be embedded on the website and editable via the Admin Panel.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to this configuration.

Volunteer.title: Volunteer
Volunteer.description: Represents a volunteer registration for the event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Volunteer registration.

externalAuthUserId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system (e.g., Google). (Relationship: ExternalAuthUser 1:N Volunteer)

name.description: The full name of the volunteer.

email.description: The email of the volunteer from auth.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the volunteer.

areaOfService.description: The specific area(s) where the volunteer wishes to serve (e.g., Crowd Management, Prasad Distribution, Cleanliness, Medical Help).

registrationDate.description: The timestamp when the volunteer registered.

DarshanRegistration.title: DarshanRegistration
DarshanRegistration.description: Represents a user's registration for Darshan with group details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Darshan registration.

externalAuthUserId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the user from the external authentication system.

userName.description: The name of the primary contact person.

userEmail.description: The email of the primary contact person.

userPhone.description: The contact phone number of the primary contact person.

totalPeople.description: The total number of people in the group.

devotees.description: List of all individuals (including the primary contact) attending.

registrationDate.description: The timestamp when the user registered for Darshan.

DonationPurpose.title: DonationPurpose
DonationPurpose.description: Defines different categories or reasons for making a donation, editable via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the donation purpose.

title.description: The title or name of the donation purpose (e.g., 'Event Arrangements').

description.description: A detailed description of what the donation purpose supports.

displayOrder.description: An integer indicating the order in which this purpose should be displayed on the frontend.

isActive.description: Indicates if this donation purpose is currently active and visible on the frontend.

ProminentDonor.title: ProminentDonor
ProminentDonor.description: Stores details of prominent donors to be displayed on the website, manageable via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the prominent donor entry.

name.description: The name of the prominent donor or donor entity.

description.description: A short description or acknowledgement for the donor (e.g., 'Generous contribution to event arrangements').

displayOrder.description: An integer indicating the order in which this donor should be displayed on the frontend.

contributionDetails.description: Further details about the donor's contribution, if any.

GalleryImage.title: GalleryImage
GalleryImage.description: Represents an image in the event's photo gallery, editable via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the gallery image.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the high-resolution image file.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of a smaller thumbnail version of the image for efficient loading.

caption.description: A descriptive caption for the image.

uploadDate.description: The timestamp when the image was uploaded.

tags.description: Keywords or categories associated with the image for filtering or search purposes.

isVisible.description: Indicates if the image is currently visible in the public gallery.

DailyBlessingPhoto.title: DailyBlessingPhoto
DailyBlessingPhoto.description: Stores photos of Sai Baba for 'Today's Darshan in Blessing Column', updated daily via the Admin Panel.

id.description: Unique identifier for the daily blessing photo.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the photo of Sai Baba for daily blessings.

blessingDate.description: The specific calendar date for which this blessing photo is designated.

caption.description: A short message or blessing text accompanying the photo.

uploadedAt.description: The timestamp when the photo was uploaded to the system.

definition.description: Stores a singleton document for global application configuration settings. Publicly readable, writable only by authenticated administrators.
Stores individual volunteer registrations. Each document is uniquely identified by `volunteerId` and nested under the `userId` of the registering user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the Firebase authenticated user who registered as a volunteer.

params.name: volunteerId
params.description: The unique ID of the volunteer registration document.

definition.description: Stores individual Darshan registrations. Each document is uniquely identified by `registrationId` and nested under the `userId` of the registering user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the Firebase authenticated user who registered for Darshan.

params.name: registrationId
params.description: The unique ID of the Darshan registration document.

definition.description: Stores details of prominent donors for public display.
Stores metadata for images in the public photo gallery.
Stores daily photos of Sai Baba for 'Today's Darshan in Blessing Column'.
Stores an empty document for each user who has 'admin' privileges.

params.name: adminUid
params.description: The unique ID of the Firebase authenticated user with admin privileges.

firestore.reasoning: Standard Firestore structure with path-based ownership for user data and role-based access for admin content.
